stemHtml: Aircraft "A" is the only aircraft to be flying in the traffic pattern, and has clearance to land on RWY 35L. When turning onto final approach, the pilot observes an unexpected aircraft on final (aircraft "B"), close to aircraft "A" and flying towards the same runway, at a lower altitude. The aircraft are both of the single-engine piston type. What should the pilot of aircraft "A" do?

options.a: Accelerate to overtake aircraft "B" and land on RWY 35L.
options.b: Continue to land on RWY 35L, in accordance with the clearance.
options.c: Descend to a lower altitude than aircraft "B" and inform ATC.
options.d: Give way to aircraft "B" and inform ATC about the traffic.
